title: oenothera biennis var. muricata
intro: Oenothera biennis var. muricata, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Onagraceae, characterized by its fragrant, yellow or pink flowers that bloom in the evening and wilt by morning. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome, and support heart health. The medicinal properties of Oenothera biennis var. muricata include its high content of essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant include capsules, oil extracts, and teas, which are often used to support skin health, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation.
